argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const user_id = '{{ user_id }}'; const panelTop = document.querySelector('main .woo-panel-top'); const buttons = panelTop ? panelTop.querySelectorAll('button') : []; let followBtn = null; let foundBtnText = ''; for (const btn of buttons) { const txt = (btn.innerText || btn.textContent || '').trim(); if (txt === '关注' || txt === 'Follow' || txt === '+ 关注') { followBtn = btn; foundBtnText = txt; break; } } if (!followBtn) { return [{ status: 'success', message: 'Already following this user (no follow button found)', user_id }]; } followBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); return [{ status: 'success', message: 'Follow button clicked', user_id, btn_text: foundBtnText }]; }
